title: gadellia lactiflora
intro: Gadellia lactiflora is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gadellia lactiflora include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Gadellia lactiflora can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
